fieldGuide.path: File where the symbol is declared.
fieldGuide.exportPath: Present when the symbol is re-exported through another module (barrel or alias); value is that re-exporting file.
fieldGuide.localName: Real declared identifier at path:lineStart when it differs from the exported name (aliased re-export).
fieldGuide.isAlias: True when the exported name differs from the declared identifier.
fieldGuide.type: Declaration kind: const | let | var | function | class | interface | type | enum.
fieldGuide.typeOnly: True for type-only declarations or `export type` re-exports.
fieldGuide.parameters: Function/hook parameters: name, type, optional, rest. Use to build correct calls.
fieldGuide.typeParameters: Generic parameter declarations, e.g. ["T", "K extends string"].
fieldGuide.deprecated: True when the declaration carries an @deprecated JSDoc tag.
fieldGuide.properties: Members of an interface or object-like type alias for fixture/payload construction.
fieldGuide.variants: Object branches of a union type alias.
fieldGuide.enumMembers: Enum member names and resolved constant values.
fieldGuide.value: Literal value of a primitive const export (number/string/boolean/null).
fieldGuide.isHook: True for React hooks (use* name with a call signature).
fieldGuide.jsDoc: Parsed JSDoc/TSDoc summary text and tags.
fieldGuide.dependencies: Local exported symbols this declaration calls, constructs, or renders.
fieldGuide.usedBy: Files that import this symbol (test/spec/story files excluded).

Aggregates the boni from all installed modules on an asset into a single AssetBoni object. Multiplier fields are multiplied (identity 1.0), additive fields summed (identity 0), boolean flags OR-ed. Assets with condition < 20 are treated as broken and contribute no boni — this gives a clear gameplay signal that repair is needed before bonuses apply again.

Daily revenue scaled by condition. A broken asset (condition < 20) returns 0 — the aggregate-boni neutralization only zeroes the delta, but `baseDailyRevenue` is a chassis field and would otherwise still pay out `base * (condition/100)`. jsDoc.summary: Deterministic seeded RNG helpers for asset ticks and crowdfund resolution. The asset system requires deterministic random rolls so save/reload yields identical outcomes. The reducer must remain pure, so RNG is pre-rolled in the action creator and passed via action payload as a stream of 0..1 values. `mulberry32` is a small, fast, well-distributed PRNG suitable for game RNG. ARRIVAL_REF_RESET_TRIGGER = 'nodeId' — the ref is cleared in a useEffect cleanup keyed on `player.currentNodeId`, so stale guards never block arrivals at subsequent nodes even after an error or a rapid node change.
